attempt_1_original.rejection_reason: Photograph prop showed group of people in a legible formal group portrait — critical gate triggered

attempt_2_corrected.strategy: Photograph turned face-down — only yellowed blank paper back visible

critical_gate_check.gate: No face or human figure visible in photograph prop
critical_gate_check.detail: The paper/photograph prop is lying FACE-DOWN. Only the blank yellowed aged paper back is visible. No photographic content, no faces, no human figures, no group portrait visible. Critical gate corrective strategy succeeded on attempt 2.

child_shoe.detail: Dark leather Mary-Jane style shoe with buckle strap, heavily worn and distressed, centre-left of frame — excellent

rusted_can.detail: Cylindrical metal can lying on its side to the right, heavily rusted — correct

paper_photograph.detail: Single aged yellowed piece of paper lying face-down on ground, only blank paper back visible, edges showing age/wear — CRITICAL GATE PASSED

checks.photograph_face_down_or_blank: PASS — paper is face-down, only blank yellowed surface visible
checks.no_modern_objects: PASS — all items consistent with pre-1974 era
checks.tone_quiet_respectful: PASS — dark, quiet, evocative of memory without exploitation
checks.correct_scene_match: PASS — child's shoe, aged paper/photo face-down, rusted can on concrete floor
checks.usable_for_slow_zoom_in: PASS — still life detail rewards slow push in 30 seconds

visual_observations: Shoe: EXCELLENT — dark aged leather with buckle, correctly worn and distressed
Can: PRESENT — horizontal rusted cylinder, correct
Paper: FACE-DOWN — only blank yellowed aged paper back visible. No photographic content at all. Strategy worked.
Setting: Dark concrete floor with gravel/fine debris. Rear concrete wall at back corner.
Lighting: Dim atmospheric side light from upper-left. Warm/dark palette correct.
Color palette: Near-monochrome dark browns and near-blacks. Paper provides warm aged-yellow accent.
post_process_notes: Minimal processing needed. Film grain. Color is already near dark_documentary target. Slow_zoom_in at 30-second duration. Warm paper tones against dark concrete creates the needed emotional pocket.
